summary: Iteration 66: FULL PROFITABILITY UPGRADE validation COMPLETE. All 25 backend tests passed. Verified all upgrade changes: (1) opposite_side_held filter REMOVED from crypto_sniper (not in rejection_reasons), (2) crypto_max_exposure=180 (up from 120), (3) max_position_size=40 (up from 25), (4) max_tte_seconds=43200 (12h, up from 8h), (5) Weather auto_exit for NEGATIVE_EDGE + TIME_INEFFICIENCY verified in shadow_exit_counts, (6) min_edge_bps_long=500 (down from 700), (7) Arb positions cleaned (<$0.50) - current count=19 (<25), (8) hard_max_stale_seconds=2400 (up from 1800) + staleness_per_minute_bps=6 (up from 5), (9) asymmetric_enabled=False (disabled), (10) Telegram upgrade tracking active with baseline capture and periodic comparison.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 66 validated the complete profitability upgrade rollout. All 10 config/feature changes verified: (1) opposite_side_held filter removed, (2) crypto_max_exposure=180, (3) max_position_size=40, (4) max_tte_seconds=43200, (5) weather auto_exit for negative_edge+time_inefficiency, (6) min_edge_bps_long=500, (7) tiny arb cleanup, (8) hard_max_stale=2400 + staleness_per_min=6, (9) asymmetric disabled, (10) Telegram upgrade tracking active. The upgrade tracking system shows baseline vs post-upgrade metrics and will send periodic updates (2h intervals) and final report (6h). Current crypto rejection reasons: insufficient_vol_data (600), tte (25) - no opposite_side_held.
